text.title: Mobile Performance Budget Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for setting and enforcing a perf budget.

step.name: measure-baseline
step.action: Run Lighthouse mobile preset on top 5 routes. Capture LCP, INP, CLS, transfer, JS gz, image, TBT.

step.name: set-budget-per-route
step.action: For each route group, set budgets: LCP ≤ 2500ms, INP ≤ 200ms, CLS ≤ 0.1, transfer total ≤ 1500KB, JS gz ≤ 200KB, image ≤ 800KB, TBT ≤ 300ms. Adjust per route if baseline already exceeds and business requires.
step.decision-gate: If any route's set budget is worse than CWV thresholds, STOP and discuss tradeoff.

step.name: wire-ci
step.action: Add Lighthouse CI step (lhci autorun) with budgets.json. Configure to comment on PR with diff vs main. Set status check to required.
step.decision-gate: If CI step is optional / informational, STOP and make it required.

step.name: document-rationale
step.action: Write /docs/perf-budget.md per route group, including rationale + how to request a budget increase.

step.name: quarterly-review-cycle
step.action: Schedule quarterly review meeting. Compile CrUX p75 trends. Adjust budgets with written rationale or hold the line.
step.output: Review minutes attached to budget doc.
